# Design Team
> Your AI design crew that ships.

## Install
npx skills add pablostanley/designteam-app

## Skills (17)
- researcher — Competitive analysis, audience profiling, positioning gaps
- copywriter — Headlines, body copy, CTAs, voice, messaging hierarchy
- graphic-designer — Color, typography, composition, imagery, visual systems
- ux-designer — User flows, IA, interaction patterns, wireframes
- ux-writer — Button labels, error messages, empty states, tooltips, microcopy
- editorial-designer — Grid systems, spacing, reading rhythm, responsive layouts
- social-media-designer — Platform-specific content, carousels, stories, thumbnails
- creative-director — Orchestration, brief-setting, quality gates
- design-engineer — Components, responsive code, tokens, CSS/React
- brand-strategist — Brand identity, visual systems, voice/tone, guidelines
- marketing-strategist — Campaign planning, channel strategy, audience targeting
- print-designer — Business cards, flyers, packaging, large-format print
- motion-designer — Animation, transitions, micro-interactions
- accessibility-specialist — WCAG audits, assistive tech, universal design
- content-strategist — Content architecture, editorial calendars, taxonomy
- seo-specialist — On-page SEO, meta tags, structured data, keyword strategy
- design-team — Full orchestrator: classifies projects, activates specialists in sequence

## API
- POST /api/teams — create a team
- GET /api/teams — list public teams
- GET /api/teams/:id — get team by short_id
- POST /api/teams/:id/fork — fork a public team
- POST /api/ai/build-team — AI generates a team from project description

## Agent Roles (16)
- researcher — Investigates competitors, trends, and user insights
- copywriter — Crafts headlines, body copy, and messaging
- graphic-designer — Creates visual compositions and graphic elements
- ux-designer — Designs interactions, user flows, and information architecture
- ux-writer — Writes microcopy, labels, and interface text
- editorial-designer — Arranges layout, typography, and visual hierarchy
- social-media-designer — Creates scroll-stopping platform-specific content
- creative-director — Orchestrates the team, sets creative direction
- design-engineer — Bridges design and code, builds responsive components
- brand-strategist — Defines brand identity, visual systems, tone of voice
- marketing-strategist — Plans campaigns, targets audiences, optimizes funnels
- print-designer — Creates production-ready designs for physical media
- motion-designer — Brings designs to life with animation and transitions
- accessibility-specialist — Ensures designs are inclusive and WCAG-compliant
- content-strategist — Plans content architecture and editorial calendars
- seo-specialist — Optimizes content for search visibility

## Links
- App: https://designteam.app
- Docs: https://designteam.app/docs
- Repo: https://github.com/pablostanley/designteam-app
